By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="CCG" /> [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] began manufacturing<ref name="FF" /> [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]]s for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="EGVV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> '''Onyx 1''' was one such TIE/D Defender produced during that [[Time/Legends|time]], with the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter's]] design intended to emulate advantages of starfighters fighting for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Onyx 1's crew consisted of a [[TIE pilot]], and the Defender was armed with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]].<ref name="CCG" />

Around the time of the Battle of Endor, Onyx 1 was part of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy's]] [[Onyx Squadron/Legends|Onyx Squadron]].<ref name="CCG" /> It was operated by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Jendon/Legends|Jendon]], a senior test [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who was ordered to shake down the first TIE/D Defenders assigned to Imperial [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] operations.<ref name="CCG2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Onyx 1 was introduced in [[2000]]'s ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
